languages.text: "Вот оно что..." {n}Себериан вздыхает, и все его тело, прошитое металлом, вздымается и опадает словно огромная волна.{/n} "И как вы смотрите на его предложение?"
"So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"
languages.original_text: "Вот оно что..." {n}Себериан вздыхает, и все его тело, прошитое металлом, вздымается и опадает словно огромная волна.{/n} "И как вы смотрите на его предложение?"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, I see..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body bulges and subsides like a giant wave.{/n} "So what do you think about his offer?"
"Oh, I see..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body bulges and subsides like a giant wave.{/n} "So what do you think about his offer?"
"So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"
"So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"
"So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

languages.text: "So ist das also ..." {n}Seberian seufzt und sein in Metall gehüllter Körper hebt und senkt sich wie eine riesige Welle.{/n} "Und was haltet Ihr von seinem Angebot?"
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: "So ist das also ..." {n}Seberian seufzt und sein in Metall gehüllter Körper hebt und senkt sich wie eine riesige Welle.{/n} "Und was haltet Ihr von seinem Angebot?"

languages.text: « C'est donc ça... » {n}Seberian soupire, et son corps en métal tout entier se soulève et retombe, comme une vague géante.{/n} « Et que pensez-vous de sa proposition ? »
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est donc ça... » {n}Seberian soupire, et son corps en métal tout entier se soulève et retombe, comme une vague géante.{/n} « Et que pensez-vous de sa proposition ? »

languages.text: «De modo que así son las cosas...». {n}Seberian suspira, y su cuerpo entretejido con metal al completo se alza y cae como una ola gigantesca.{/n} «¿Y qué opina de su oferta?».
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: «De modo que así son las cosas...». {n}Seberian suspira, y su cuerpo entretejido con metal al completo se alza y cae como una ola gigantesca.{/n} «¿Y qué opina de su oferta?».

languages.text: "Demek böyle..." {n}İç çeken Seberian'ın metalden örülü vücudu, dev bir dalga gibi yükselip çöküyor.{/n} "Peki teklifi hakkında ne düşünüyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: "Demek böyle..." {n}İç çeken Seberian'ın metalden örülü vücudu, dev bir dalga gibi yükselip çöküyor.{/n} "Peki teklifi hakkında ne düşünüyorsun?"

languages.text: “原来如此……”{n}塞贝里安叹了口气，他那遍布金属丝线的身躯像巨浪一样起伏又颓然落下。{/n}“那你怎么看他的提议？”
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: “原来如此……”{n}塞贝里安叹了口气，他那遍布金属丝线的身躯像巨浪一样起伏又颓然落下。{/n}“那你怎么看他的提议？”

languages.text: 「なるほど、そういうことか…」{n}セベリアンはため息をつき、金属の糸でできた全身が巨大な波のように立ち上がり、沈み込む。{/n} 「彼の申し出はどう思う？」
languages.original_text: "So that's how it is..." {n}Seberian sighs, and his entire metal-threaded body rises and slumps like a giant wave.{/n} "And what do you think about his offer?"

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど、そういうことか…」{n}セベリアンはため息をつき、金属の糸でできた全身が巨大な波のように立ち上がり、沈み込む。{/n} 「彼の申し出はどう思う？」
